snippet.title: Bosanac kupio pravi vlak u voznom stanju
snippet.description:
Mladen CvitanoviƒЗ iz Golubinja kod ≈љepƒНa svjetski je putnik. Bio je najmlaƒСi vojnik Vijetnamskog rata, radio na naftnim platformama, boksao u Norve≈°koj i pobijedio 94 puta. Do≈Њivio je desetak poraza. Njegov djed je bio ≈ЊeljezniƒНar i u spomen na njega kupio je prvo parnu lokomotivu iz ≈љeljezare Zenica u ispravnom stanju a onda i dva vagona od hrvatskih ≈Њeljeznica. Mladen svako jutro trƒНi osam kilometara. Ima svoju teretanu gdje vje≈Њba a proizvodi i domaƒЗa jaja koja prodaje trgovinama i seljacima koji ne ≈Њele uzgajati koke. Mladenova namjera je obnoviti Titov plavi voz koji ƒЗe biti turistiƒНka atrakcija u Centralnoj Bosni, odnosno BiH. Zavr≈°io je i projekt ≈ЊeljezniƒНke stanice a od jeseni za turiste ƒЗe biti na raspolaganju i jedan helikopter za obilazak poznatih turistiƒНkih destinacija. Mladen je u vojsci vozio ne samo helikoptere nego i avione. Svjetski putnik iz ≈љepƒНa ima oko 65 godina ali i toliko ideja kao da mu je 35 godina. Pogledajte ovu neobiƒНnu priƒНu iz Golubinje kod ≈љepƒНa.
Pridru≈Њite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:

snippet.title: Watch NASAвАЩs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вАУ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вАУ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвАЩs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

Text:

Ref:
Ja sam hazla 

Cunami PBR THC geng vrti Sarajevo ooo 
Flo gros patroliram ≈°eherom
Adrese sti≈Њem ko amazon 
Na licu osmijeh in da biznis zone
Na cosku s gengom iznad zuji dron
Lobe brado baro gori marlboro

Samo sport ooo ovo moj je sport uouuo 
Siempre pronto siempre pronto
Textil OG kush ganjamo plus
Zakucava kazaljka radijus
Ne mogu ni≈°ta pa kazne nam pi≈°u
Evo na kafu pa odjebi U
(Hazla)

Ref:
Ja sam hazla

Od para suhe ruke tvrde od vratila
Ambicije biznisi price u kvadratima
Nista telefoni samo turska kupatila
Mala nam evropa jasemo ko Atila

Jangeri u spremi niko ne da na svoj blok
Cjevanicama punim hladno udara se ≈°tok
Za desetoro brace mati sprema wok 
Nagazili ≈°mekera podrum soba shock

Ljubav u mahali drama scenario
Rumeni obrazi al nije kardio

Sudbina takva ke≈° ƒЗemo duplat
Kurve se ≈Њale da neƒЗe se udat
Dobrom se robom ko sefte lupat
Oprat ke≈°ovinu korov poƒНupat

Ref:
Ja sam hazla

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вАЩ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вАЩ and 85вАЩ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вАЩ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вАЩ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.description: Projekat "KuƒЗa od srca" ima za cilj zbrinjavanje najugro≈Њenijih porodica na teritoriji Republike Srbije. Ministarstvo rada i socijalne politike prepoznalo je zajedniƒНke ciljeve i prikljuƒНilo se projektu вАЭ KuƒЗa od srca вАЭ u pomoƒЗi pri zadovoljavanju osnovnih potreba ugro≈Њenih porodica. Porodice koje su deo projekta вАЭ KuƒЗa od srca вАЭ uz podr≈°ku Ministarstva rada i socijalne politike imaju priliku da budu stambeno zbrinute, materijalno potpomognute, vraƒЗene u obrazovni sistem ≈°to rezultira resocijalizacijom svih ƒНlanova porodice uz akcentovanje na najmlaƒСe ƒНlanove dru≈°tva. Osnovna ideja projekta вАЭ KuƒЗa od srca вАЭ jeste ukljuƒНivanje celokupne zajednice u pomoƒЗ porodicama koje su od strane Ministarstva progla≈°ene najugro≈Њenijim. Ono ≈°to izdvaja serijal вАЬKuƒЗa od srcaвАЭ, jeste ƒНinjenica da je to prvi domaƒЗi rijaliti, koji se pored re≈°avanja stambenog pitanja kroz graƒСevinske radove, bavi i re≈°avanjem porodiƒНnih i meƒСuljudskih odnosa. Pravila serijala su jasno definisana i glase: 1. Izgradnja kuƒЗe po projektu traje 31dan i ukoliko nije gotova serijal tu zavr≈°ava, objekat ostaje u zateƒНenom stanju, sa porukom da se zajedniica ukljuƒНi I pomogne u zavr≈°etku radova. 2. Da imaju imovinu najbli≈Њih koji su spremni da je ustupe za izgradnju KuƒЗe od srca . 3. Najbli≈Њi ƒНlanovi porodice, prijatelji I kom≈°ije moraju imati pozitivno mi≈°ljenje o izabranoj porodici. 4. Punoletni ƒНlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti dru≈°tveno odgovorni : da nisu u≈Њivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izra≈Њenu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji ƒНlan porodice koji je uƒНesnik serijala prekr≈°i bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвАЩt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвАЩs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вАФ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвАЩs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвАЩt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вАФ The pacifier hack 

2:42 вАФ A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вАФ The getting along/best friendsвАЩ shirt 

7:20 вАФ Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вАФ Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвАЩs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

sve znate,face su vam bez brate
sta je to u trendingu mora da me zezate
predahnem 

Ne mogu vise da gledam ova sranja,dranja,pomilovanja
imam nocne more sanjam

celija mozdana mi manja kazu mi da sam bog
bolje bi bilo bogu da se klanjas 

ne mogu stati ja dok ne dodje do klanja
jebeno lud evo mentalnog mi stanja 
eto me svud samo ganjam
vidi mi trud vidi kralja 
hejtere udarim preko glave poput thorovoga malja 

brate udarim kako valja,neko mi tamo obraz kalja 
habada babada babada babada govore glupi ljudi puni znanja
koliko repera trebam da pokidam da bi razumeli da sam budala
voli me svaki blok kraj stek voli me svaka mahala 
reperi za mene su sala meni je mikrofon taj alat
bolje mi bezi bre pedala,hteo bi feat neka hvala  
ne mogu tik tok repere,hip hop trepere para
ne mogu da mi plate pa se zapale izgore ko cigara
stivena sigala glume ala nemaju signala 
ponela ih slava dali za to deo svog anala
u Srbiji sam tata,kralj bog,eminem pa alah 
tako govore ljudi za mene pa mi previsoka skala 
ovo je odvod,prati moj hod UFO moj brod
ljudi su govna neki su manji govnima su pod rod
ja sam pro pro nisam propo moj kod 
10 dina ovde sada uso sam u GOD MOde


Malo mi treba da napadnem likove
moji mi govore ne veruj nikome 
pojedem barove snerove bitove 
ne moze niko da ponovi i to me 
zele kopirati praviti hitove
da li je moguce neko da skine me 
picke mekane face im vilene
oni bi hteli dole da vide me 

ne mogu dole da budem ja gorim 
i gorivo tera me jako da lomi
i repere volim kad leze u komi
a lirika zube im polomi boli 
ti bogovi pitaju kako postojim
i rogovi rastu mi sebe se bojim
jebe se meni da pobede brojim
propali ovi tu reperi tvoji

Za 10 godina nisam postigo ono sto ti si 

zabole me ono sto mi visi 

razlika izmedju mene i tebe 
kad ja repovo sam ti si tati u testisu bio samo orhitis-guglaj

U prevodu bio si bol u mudima
svako se pita na sta tacno ja aludiram 
ovo skola je za sve a oni mi uzina 
radis playback to ti je kao sebi da aplaudiras 
boii

Vidim dredove te furas glumac
nisi lil pump mozda mala pumpica za kurac
dm rejpujes mi nisam do sad video te buraz 
ni spomenuo pa ne znam zasto se tu guras

hoces clout vidim da si nula 
jebo mir hocu rat evo kozna frula
posto vidim bas si zapeo da duvas 
takve jebem vec odavno nemoj tu da mi se kurvas

snippet.title: Mission Control Live: NASA Lands Perseverance Mars Rover (360 video)
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. Watch here for a 360-degree engineer's-eye-view from inside Mission Control at NASAвАЩs Jet Propulsion Laboratory, with picture-in-picture commentary.

To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вАУ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вАУ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.

Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app. 2-D video available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ

Credit: NASA-JPL/Caltech

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Monah Arsenije - Vladari iz senke ≈Њele poslu≈°ne zombije i obezbo≈Њene robove! (13.2.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je otac Arsenije JovanoviƒЗ, monah Srpske pravoslavne crkve i iguman manastira svetih apostola Petra i Pavle. Pro≈°ao je dug put od Senjaka, elitnog dela Beograda u kojem je odrastao i proveo deo mladosti, preko Ostroga, do manastira Ribnica kod Mionice, gde danas sa bratijom slu≈Њi Bogu. Kao mladiƒЗ, koji je u vreme osamdesetih вАЬimao sveвАЭ, a opet oseƒЗao neizrecivu prazninu i besmisao, bio je svedok tragiƒНne sudbine kruga vrhunskih umetnika, muziƒНara, slikara stare SFRJ koji su, zajedno sa njim, beg od tog istog besmisla potra≈Њili u jo≈° veƒЗem ni≈°tavilu. O ≈Њivotu pre mona≈°enja napisao je knjigu вАЬBog i rokenrolвАЭ, svedoƒНenje i uspomenu na preminule prijatelje i poznanike. Neki su mu zamerili, nekima je knjiga spasila ≈Њivot. Danas monah Arsenije odi≈°e nenametljivim mirom ƒНoveka koji je вАЬprobao sve i pro≈°ao svudвАЭ i na kraju se vratio u svoj dom, tamo gde je oduvek pripadao, a da toga u poƒНetku nije bio svestan. U kontaktu je sa mnogim mladim urbanim ljudima koji kod njega dolaze po savet, muƒНeni istim onim besmislom sa kojim se i sam kao momak borio. PreporuƒНujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate vi≈°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 04.02.2021. godine u manastiru Ribnica kod Mionice. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar PavkoviƒЗ.

Danas monah Arsenije odi≈°e nenametljivim mirom ƒНoveka koji je вАЬprobao sve i pro≈°ao svudвАЭ i na kraju se vratio u svoj dom, tamo gde je oduvek pripadao, a da toga u poƒНetku nije bio svestan. U kontaktu je sa mnogim mladim urbanim ljudima koji kod njega dolaze po savet, muƒНeni istim onim besmislom sa kojim se i sam kao momak borio. PreporuƒНujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate vi≈°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 04.02.2021. godine u manastiru Ribnica kod Mionice. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar PavkoviƒЗ.

All three of these contenders can produce a serious amount of power. First up weвАЩve got Mat in his RS6, which is powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 and can put down 600hp & 800Nm of torque. snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
WeвАЩve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereвАЩs what we created. ArenвАЩt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letвАЩs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts youвАЩll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 вАФ How to fix a broken wood piece

localized.description:

snippet.title: Mission Control Live: NASA Lands Perseverance Mars Rover (clean feed)
snippet.description:
Mission Control Live: NASA Lands Perseverance Mars Rover (clean feed)

Watch and listen as signals arrive at Mission Control at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory in Southern California from the Perseverance rover as it lands on Mars.

More Mars 2020 rover and Mars helicopter resources can be found at https://go.nasa.gov/mars2020toolkit

Credit: NASA-JPL/Caltech

snippet.title: Kako je N1 napao Sa≈°u RaduloviƒЗa kada je govorio o Belivuku 2017.
snippet.description:
U gostovanju 2017. godine na televiziji N1 uoƒНi predsedniƒНkih izbora Sa≈°a RaduloviƒЗ je govorio o tome u kakvoj se sprezi nalazi vlast sa navijaƒНkim grupama, Aleksandrom StankoviƒЗem zvanim Sale Mutavi i Veljkom Belivukom zvani Velja Nevolja, o ƒНinjenici da su imali slu≈Њbene legitimacije, slu≈Њbeno oru≈Њje, da su komunicirali sa vrhom dr≈Њave i tome na koji naƒНin te grupe peru novac od trgovine narkoticima i o kriviƒНnoj prijavi koju je podneo.

Voditelj N1Jugoslav ƒЖosiƒЗ je doƒНekao ovo na no≈Њ, tra≈Њio dokaze, kao da je posao graƒСana da istra≈Њuju kriminal i sakupljaju dokaze, a ne da svoja saznanja podnesu u kriviƒНnoj prijavi, a da policija i tu≈Њila≈°tvo istra≈Њuju. InaƒНe, u to doba ceo Beograd je znao i naravno cela policija i svi novinari i svi su se pravili blesavi.

Sada, 4 godine kasnije, se sve ovo ≈°to je Sa≈°a RaduloviƒЗ govorio o sprezi vlasti i kriminala pokazuje kao istina.

Koliko je ≈Њivota moglo biti spa≈°eno da je reagovano na vreme? Za≈°to se nijedan medij nije bavio istra≈ЊivaƒНkim novinarstvom, veƒЗ su odluƒНili da ignori≈°u ono ≈°to je govorio Sa≈°a RaduloviƒЗ pre 4 godine?

Join us for our 2021 Team Launch, LIVE from the McLaren Technology Centre. See the #MCL35M unveiled and hear from Lando Norris and Daniel Ricciardo. Oh, and there's a few surprises sprinkled in too... рЯСА

#SendIt

Join McLaren Plus, our fan engagement programme which brings McLaren fans closer to the team with the most inclusive, rewarding and open-to-all fan programmes in F1 & esports: https://www.mclaren.com/racing/mclaren+/
